description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a thick, green stem protruding from the top. The pumpkin's surface is matte and slightly rough, with visible segment lines and a somewhat squat, rounded shape. One side features a carved face in a traditional jack-o'-lantern style, with angular eyes and a jagged mouth, exposing the yellowish interior flesh. The rest of the pumpkin is uncarved, showing the natural, ribbed exterior. The stem is textured and tapers to a point, adding a realistic touch. There are no visible accessories or additional decorations attached to the pumpkin.
description: A squat, orange pumpkin with a green stem and a carved jack-o'-lantern face on one side. The surface is matte and ribbed, with a yellow interior visible through the carving.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pumpkin's green stem and a partial glimpse of the carved face on the left side.
description_view_1: Back view displaying the uncarved, ribbed orange surface and the full stem, with no facial features visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the pumpkin's rounded shape and the stem, with no carving visible.
description_view_3: Angled view clearly showing the carved jack-o'-lantern face with angular eyes and a jagged mouth, as well as the stem.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with two angular eyes and a jagged, zigzag mouth. The carving is simple and geometric, exposing the yellowish interior flesh.
